channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Tanzanian climate expert Winfrida Shonde to represent Africa at Space Economy Summit in Lisbon
item.description: Tanzanian environmentalist and TEEMO Africa founder Winfrida Shonde has been selected as a speaker at the Space Economy Summit Europe 2026, which will take place in Lisbon, Portugal on May 5–6, 2026. ...

item.title: HEC to Introduce Blockchain-Powered Digital Degree Attestation
item.description: The Higher Education Commission (HEC) of Pakistan is set to significantly streamline the degree attestation process by introducing a new, blockchain-powered digital system. This initiative aims to eli...

item.title: Challenging gender norms in Uganda’s pig industry opens economic opportunities for women
item.description: In Uganda, deep-rooted social and gender norms have historically restricted women from participating fully in the pig farming sector. Pigs are often wrongly associated with dirtiness, and cultural bel...

item.title: Keir Starmer to face Commons scrutiny over handling of Mandelson vetting scandal
item.description: Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer is set to face intense questioning in the House of Commons over the handling of the vetting process for Lord Mandelson’s appointment as UK ambassador to the United Stat...

item.title: Six-year-old boy killed in car collision in Ellesmere Port, Cheshire
item.description: A six-year-old boy has tragically died following a road collision in Ellesmere Port, Cheshire. The incident occurred on Sunday at approximately 11:40am on Anchor Drive, when the young boy was involved...

item.title: Pakistan steps up security as US-Iran talks set for second round in Islamabad
item.description: Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi met US Ambassador to Pakistan Natalie Baker in Islamabad to review security arrangements for the expected second round of talks between the United States and Iran. The m...

item.title: 7.5-magnitude earthquake off northern Japan triggers tsunami warning and evacuations
item.description: A powerful 7.5-magnitude earthquake struck off the northern coast of Japan near Iwate Prefecture, prompting authorities to issue a tsunami warning and urge immediate evacuations from coastal and river...

item.title: Rescued Kidnap Victims From Benue Share Ordeal After 4 Days In Captivity
item.description: Some passengers wey dem kidnap for Benue State don finally regain their freedom after four days of serious suffering inside the bush. The incident happen on Wednesday along Taraku-Otukpo Road when gun...

item.title: Marcos Trust Up, Duterte Performance Down in Q1 2026 Survey
item.description: According to an Octa Research survey released on April 20, 2026, President Bongbong Marcos has experienced a moderate increase in his trust and performance ratings during the first quarter of the year...

item.title: Stella Rejects Vincent's Help Offer in The Alibi Episode 24
item.description: In the latest episode of the popular ABS-CBN series The Alibi, Stella Morales made a firm decision by refusing the assistance offered by Vincent Cabrera. This development happened in Episode 24 which ...

item.title: How school climate hubs in Sierra Leone are preparing young people for future climate challenges
item.description: This article discusses how young people in Sierra Leone, especially in the secondary city of Bo, are being prepared to deal with the growing impacts of climate change. Researchers and educators partne...

item.title: Rajasthan CM criticises Opposition over rejection of Women’s Reservation Constitutional Amendment
item.description: Rajasthan Chief Minister Bhajan Lal Sharma on Monday strongly criticised the Opposition parties, particularly the Congress, over their stance on the proposed Constitutional Amendment related to women’...

item.title: High Court rejects legal challenge by Amy Winehouse’s father over dispute regarding her personal belongings
item.description: The High Court has ruled against the father of the late singer Amy Winehouse in a legal dispute concerning ownership and control of some of her former personal belongings. The case centred on items as...

item.title: Assessing the leadership test for EAC Secretary-General Stephen Mbundi amid stalled regional integration
item.description: The article analyses the appointment of Stephen Patrick Mbundi as the new Secretary-General of the East African Community (EAC), highlighting the expectations placed on him as he assumes office on Apr...

item.title: Mixed signals from Tehran cast doubt on second round of US-Iran talks in Islamabad
item.description: Uncertainty hangs over the possible second round of direct talks between the United States and Iran scheduled in Islamabad as mixed signals continue to come from Tehran. Iran's Foreign Ministry spokes...

item.title: Australian government to overhaul NDIS to curb rising costs ahead of federal budget
item.description: The Albanese government is set to announce a major overhaul of the National Disability Insurance Scheme (NDIS), marking the largest source of savings in the upcoming federal budget. Currently costing ...

item.title: Czech officials decline comment on Zaldy Co case citing strict EU privacy rules
item.description: Nanatiling tikom ang mga awtoridad sa Czech Republic tungkol sa iniulat na pagkaka-detine kay dating Ako Bicol Representative Zaldy Co, dahil sa mahigpit na batas sa privacy sa Europa. Ayon kay Colone...

item.title: Madhya Pradesh: BJP MLA's Sons' Accident Sparks Controversy Over Police Threats & Past Conduct
item.description: A rather messy situation has unfolded in Madhya Pradesh after the recent accident involving the sons of a BJP MLA. The incident itself, tragically, resulted in the death of a pedestrian. What’s become...

item.title: Interior Minister Naqvi holds meetings with US and Iranian envoys ahead of possible second round of US-Iran talks in Islamabad
item.description: Interior Minister Mohsin Naqvi on Monday held separate meetings with US Charge d'Affaires Natalie Baker and Iranian Ambassador Reza Amiri Moghadam to review security arrangements and preparations for ...

item.title: Leaked video shows Russian commander torturing refusenik soldier in Ukraine invasion
item.description: A leaked video has revealed the harsh treatment inflicted by a Russian commander on a refusenik soldier from the 82nd Motor Rifle Regiment (military unit 52033). The near-naked serviceman, wearing onl...
